title: Raven Phantoms
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/xd3gM9RJ/Raven-Phantoms-Title.png)

[![Twitter](https://i.postimg.cc/K8KGTMJW/Twitter.png 'Twitter')](https://twitter.com/2DWisp)   [![Ko-Fi](https://i.postimg.cc/GhLJbcqt/Ko-Fi.png 'Ko-Fi')](https://ko-fi.com/jamiecubed)   [![Modrinth](https://i.postimg.cc/44SgqRb5/Modrinth.png 'Modrinth')](https://modrinth.com/user/JamieCubed)

## 🐦‍⬛ Introduction:

Replaces phantoms with ravens. Also replaces all phantom-related items with raven-related ones, and includes a raven-themed elytra variant using CIT.

### 🪽 How To Get Raven Wings:

Using the anvil, rename your elytra to *Raven Wings*. Demo below.

![Renaming Guide](https://i.postimg.cc/B6KFPfdM/Renaming-Guide.png)

### ⚠️ Required Mods:

One of the following setups ***must*** be installed for this pack to work as intended. The pack won't break your game without them, but you won't get the full experience.

- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), and [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

***OR***

- The [Additive Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) or similar

***OR***

- [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)

## 🎨 All of my Creations:

## 🤔 Frequently Asked Questions:

**Q: How do I install resourcepacks?**  
A: Follow [this guide](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/).

**Q: The pack isn't working!**  
A: Please make sure either of the setups mentioned in 'Required Mods' above is installed correctly.

**Q: Can you port this to Bedrock?**  
A: I currently have no plans to port this to Bedrock.

**Q: Can someone else port this to Bedrock?**  
A: No, I do not allow third-party ports of my packs.

**Q: Can you add this feature?**  
A: Maybe! Comment any suggestions and we can see what happens.

**Q: I found a bug!**  
A: Comment all bugs and I will fix them as soon as possible.

**Q: Does this pack work on X version?**  
A: Probably. In theory, the pack should work on most modern versions. Though I do not support older versions of Minecraft. 

**Q: Can I add this to my modpack?**  
A: Of course! You must give credit and can not claim any of my work as your own.
